title: autobench.curriculum.problem v1
description: One newly-generated curriculum problem. Emitted by autobench.curriculum.CurriculumAgent each time a problem is synthesized. Source: /autobench.

id.description: ULID — unique identifier for this event

session_id.description: ULID for the curriculum cycle; correlates events across channels

case_id.description: Stable id for the generated case (e.g. curr-2026-05-16-03)

cycle_id.description: Cycle tag (curr-YYYY-MM-DD-<epoch>) — groups all problems generated in the same cycle. Absent on events emitted before multi-cycle attribution (nervous-bus-9obz).

prompt_preview.description: First ~280 chars of the problem prompt — bus payload bound

target_skills.description: Skills the problem is designed to drill (e.g. ['dp', 'large-arrays'])

difficulty_rating.description: CF-style rating (800–3500 typical, 0 allowed for trivial)

generator_model.description: Model id that produced the problem (e.g. MiniMax-M2.7)

rationale_preview.description: First ~280 chars of generator rationale (why this problem)

date.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) the curriculum cycle ran
